dj_text: Alright, switching it up! The White Stripes - Seven Nation Army [Medieval Style Cover] done. Here comes Bon Jovi - It's My Life [Bardcore / Medieval Style Cover]!
commercial_text: We interrupt this broadcast to bring you... nothing. We just wanted your attention. Carry on.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
